# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
- name: backup-storage
  type: gcp-types/storage-v1:buckets
  properties:
    bucketPolicyOnly: true
    location: us-central1
    storageClass: STANDARD
